member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.AppInstallsController.GetAppInstallAsync(DinderDLL.Requests.GetAppInstallRequest)
member.summary: Retrieves a App Install by GUID --Untested
member.returns: A response with an App Install
member.response: If App Install is not exists
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.GlobalMealsController.GetGlobalMealsAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves global meals by name or description
member.returns: A response with global meals list
member.response: If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.GlobalMealsController.GetGlobalMealAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves a Global Meal by Global Meal GUID
member.returns: A response with a global meal
member.response: If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.GetPartiesAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves parties the user is invited to or hosting.
member.returns: A response with parties the user is invited to or is hosting
member.response: If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.GetPartySettingsAsync(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves party settings. Only invited users and the host can do this.
member.returns: A response with party settings list
member.response: If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.GetPartyInvitesAsync(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves party invites. Only invited users and the host can do this.
member.returns: A response with party settings list
member.response: If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.GetPartyAsync(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves a party by PartyID. Only invited users or the host can do this.
member.returns: A response with a party
member.response: If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.PostPartyAsync(System.Guid,DinderDLL.Requests.PostPartyRequest)
member.returns: A response with new meal
member.response: A response as creation of party
If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.PutPartySettingAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Updates an existing party setting. Only the host can do this.
member.returns: A response as update party setting result
member.response: If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.PutPartyAsync(System.Int32,DinderDLL.Requests.PutPartyRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing party. Only the host can do this.
member.returns: A response as update party result
member.response: If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.DeletePartyAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes an existing party. Only the host can do this.
member.returns: A response as delete party result
member.response: If there was an internal server error

member.summary: RSVP or un-RSVP from a party. Only the invitee can do this.
member.returns: A response as update party result
member.response: If there was an internal server error

member.name: M:DinderMVC.Controllers.PartiesController.DeletePartyInviteAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes an existing Party Invite. Only the host can do this.

member.response: If there was an internal server error
